user.title: APC PDU Setup
user.description: Configure SNMPv3 access to your APC PDU.

data_description.name: Leave blank to use the name configured on the PDU itself.
data_description.auth_key: Required when Authentication Protocol is not 'none'.
data_description.priv_key: Required when Privacy Protocol is not 'none'.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the PDU. Check the IP address, port, and SNMPv3 credentials.
error.auth_key_required: An Authentication Password is required when the Authentication Protocol is not 'none'.
error.priv_key_required: A Privacy Password is required when the Privacy Protocol is not 'none'.

init.title: APC PDU Options
init.description: Changes take effect immediately — no restart required.

data_description.outlet_count: Leave unticked (or set to 0) to auto-detect the outlet count from the PDU. Set a value only if auto-detection returns the wrong number of outlets.
data_description.scan_interval: How often Home Assistant polls the PDU to check outlet states. Lower values give faster detection of changes made outside HA, at the cost of slightly more network traffic. Minimum 5 seconds, maximum 300 seconds.
